name: /agent-verify appends a jsonl audit entry to .claude-tdd-pro/agent-verify.jsonl on each invocation per F-3 audit-trail requirement
command:
printf 'diff stub
' > d.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
echo "verdict: agree"
' > v.sh && chmod +x v.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-verify.sh" --diff d.txt --verifier-stub ./v.sh 2>/dev/null && [ -s .claude-tdd-pro/agent-verify.jsonl ] && grep -q '"verdict":"agree"' .claude-tdd-pro/agent-verify.jsonl && echo logged 1>&2
